description: Three-bed ranch in 48228 with the classic Section 8 profile: Zillow rents it at $1,258 and voucher upside runs to roughly $1,500, subject to inspection and rent reasonableness. Rental-grade scope is $20–30k — trash-out, kitchen, bath refresh, flooring, paint, with an aging water heater and HVAC to plan around. Renovated values in the area support $90k–$100k, and taxes are light at about $942 a year. Delinquent tax liens are being cleared and verified through title — confirm in diligence.
highlights: Section 8 upside to ~$1,500/mo (est., subject to inspection)
